fulltext: FSM_Autopilot shall always satisfy (state = ap_transition_state & good & supported & !standby) => STATE = ap_nominal_state
FSM_Autopilot shall always satisfy (standby & state = ap_transition_state) => STATE = ap_standby_state
FSM_Autopilot shall always satisfy (state=ap_nominal_state & standby)  => STATE = ap_standby_state
FSM_Autopilot shall always satisfy (state = ap_transition_state & good & supported) => STATE = ap_nominal_state
FSM_Autopilot shall always satisfy (state = ap_standby_state & !standby) => STATE = ap_transition_state
FSM_Autopilot shall always satisfy (state = ap_standby_state & apfail )=> STATE = ap_maneuver_state
FSM_Autopilot shall always satisfy (state = ap_nominal_state & ! good & ! standby) => STATE = ap_maneuver_state
FSM_Autopilot shall always satisfy (state = ap_standby_state & ! standby & ! apfail ) => STATE = ap_transition_state
FSM_Autopilot shall always satisfy (state = ap_maneuver_state & supported & good) => STATE = ap_transition_state
FSM_Autopilot shall always satisfy (! good & state = ap_nominal_state) => STATE = ap_maneuver_state
FSM_Autopilot shall always satisfy (state = ap_maneuver_state & supported & good & ! standby) => STATE = ap_transition_state
FSM_Autopilot shall always satisfy (state = ap_maneuver_state & standby & good) => STATE = ap_standby_state
